intro: Between April 8 and April 27, 2026, ZCyberNews published 26 articles under the ai tag, with the threat actor Pushpaganda appearing most frequently. The coverage spanned sectors including technology, critical infrastructure, enterprise software, finance, and financial services, affecting regions globally, particularly the United States, Asia, Australia, and Canada. The severity mix included 11 high, 10 informational, 1 critical, and 4 medium reports.
